description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and extensive use of glass for large windows and sliding doors. The structure features multiple outdoor terraces, including a rooftop area with seating and greenery, as well as a ground-level patio with outdoor furniture and lush landscaping. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall and includes a swimming pool, visible from the rear and side views. The exterior is predominantly white with clean, geometric lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. Several trees and shrubs are integrated into the landscaping, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall design suggests a luxurious urban residence with ample outdoor living spaces and a focus on openness and light.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, multiple terraces, and lush landscaping, including a pool and outdoor seating areas. The design is sleek, white, and geometric, emphasizing contemporary luxury.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass windows, a main terrace with outdoor seating, and dense landscaping along the perimeter.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rooftop pool, additional terraces, and a more private, enclosed garden area.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, open patio, and a mix of greenery and paved surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, a shaded outdoor area, and more lush vegetation along the boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large glass door, minimal steps, and is integrated with a terrace and landscaped area, emphasizing openness and accessibility.
